tools.name: search_remote_jobs
tools.description: Search current remote / work-from-home job listings curated by Remote Jobs Center. Filter by free-text query, category, region, perk, or company. Returns ready-to-apply links.

tools.name: get_job
tools.description: Get full details for a single job by its slug.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List job categories with current open counts.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List curated perk-based collections (e.g. tuition reimbursement, six-figure) with counts.

tools.name: list_companies
tools.description: List companies hiring remotely with open counts. Optional category filter.
